headline: Qualcomm acquires AI startup Modular for data center push
detail: Qualcomm buying an AI software startup signals the chip industry is doubling down on data center and AI infrastructure, not just mobile. This is a positive read-through for your semiconductor and AI names - AVGO, SMH, and CRWD all sit in that ecosystem. Won't move the needle today, but confirms the sector thesis is intact.

headline: Oil tankers returning to Strait of Hormuz for big payouts
detail: Tankers being lured back in suggests geopolitical risk in the strait is still elevated but not escalating into a full blockade. A Hormuz disruption would spike oil and hit risk assets broadly, which would pressure your entire tech-heavy margin book. Worth keeping one eye on - not a crisis yet, but a slow-burn tail risk.
